title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment · Skill Brief: Stdio
summary: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext stdio increment in a local and remote transport deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.
Choose the smallest primitive that preserves consent, discoverability, caching, and semantics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
